name: Stormgate
short_description: Stormgate is a free-to-play real-time strategy game with a full single-player campaign, 3-player co-op, and PvP versus modes on over 60 maps. Our Editor is also freely available for you to craft just about any custom game mode you can imagine. Join our development journey today!
detailed_description:
What's new In the latest Community Update:

  • Huge Versus overhaul with new 2v2 matchmaking

  • 40+ new maps including FFA, & Arcade-style custom games

  • Full release of the Map Editor

  • Major visual, sound & quality-of-life improvements.

  • Bug fixes and polish across the board.

Plunge into the heart of battle as the ultimate battlefield commander fighting for survival in a science fantasy universe, where Earth’s fate hangs on the edge of oblivion.

Human defenders and their faithful robot allies stand defiant against two warring alien factions: a race of warlike demonic invaders and their technologically advanced angelic rivals. Together, these three are locked in a relentless struggle for dominance. Stormgate puts you in command of futuristic armies in epic real-time strategy battles.

Fight for the Future

Dive into the ultimate test of strategic warfare with three highly-asymmetric factions: the stalwart Human Vanguard, the relentless Infernal Host, or the highly-advanced Celestial Armada.

Team up with friends and command legendary Heroes to conquer the challenging AI in co-op mode, or test your mettle on the global stage in a hero-free competitive ranked ladder focused purely on player skill.

Next Generation RTS

Stormgate takes RTS gaming to new heights by harnessing the power of Unreal Engine 5, supercharged by our proprietary SnowPlay technology. This combination delivers an unparalleled responsive RTS gameplay experience. Our use of globally distributed servers aims to connect players from around the world, supported by advanced Rollback technology for silky smooth and stutter-free gameplay. This combination of cutting-edge technology and ultra-modern infrastructure mean you can focus entirely on defeating your opponents instead of struggling against lag.

Explore a Post-Apocalyptic Science Fantasy Universe

Stormgate’s story-driven Campaign drops players into the role of mighty Heroes fighting for the fate of the world. The free Vanguard prologue chapter includes three playable missions, with more campaign chapters available for purchase and new chapters to be released.

Gameplay Evolved

Flex your skills with an enhanced interface designed for both depth and approachability. With streamlined inputs and automatic control groups, it’s easier than ever before to just have fun while leaving the skill ceiling sky-high for those who want to push themselves to their limits.

Unleash Your Creativity

The Editor empowers you to craft your own game experiences with the most advanced yet user-friendly RTS toolset available. Integrated seamlessly within the Stormgate client, it allows for swift iteration and polish of your maps, mods, and custom games. Sculpt intricate terrain, customize units, and then share your creations with the community. With the Editor, ignite your imagination and bring your unique visions to life–you’re invited to redefine the boundaries of RTS gameplay.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
